title: Komori-san Gets Requests?
overview: Komori Shuri is fifteen years old, and for some reason, people often rely on her.

title: Komori-san is Strong!
overview: The girls think that Komori-san acts a little bit too much like a guy, but they realize quickly their assumptions may have been incorrect…

title: Komori-san is Popular!
overview: Shuri can't decline the absurd requests Megumi and Masako throw at her. Looking at how everyone in class relies on Shuri, Megumi comes to a realization and…

title: Komori-san Can Do Anything?
overview: The athletic Shuri gets asked to participate in the volleyball team's match, but she finds it hard to make plays. Megumi gets worried about her and…

title: Negishi-san Has It All Covered!
overview: Megumi gets the feeling that Shuri declines her often, and Masako, who insists she won't be declined, seems to be relied upon frequently as the class rep.

title: Ootani-kun wants to be relied on!
overview: Otani proclaims he will never ask Shuri for help, and Shuri says he'll let Otani take care of everything himself, but...

title: The Pool Gets Your Heart Racing!
overview: Summer is here and the students are out to clean the pool. Everyone asks Shuri for help, but Otani can only feel jealous of Shuri instead...

title: Summer Is for Having Fun!
overview: Summer is here, and as a break from studying, the three girls go to the beach. The next thing they know Megumi isn't with them...

title: Festivals Are Bittersweet!
overview: Shuri makes plans to have fun with her friends Megumi and Masako at a local bazaar, but Shuri keeps getting asked to help with things...

title: It's Hard to Decide on a Future Path!
overview: Shuri can't decide what she wants to be when she grows up.

title: It's Easy to Catch Cold This Time of Year!
Komori-san Can't Decline
overview: Shuri, which looks different from usual, is somewhat vague. Megumi and Masako who are worried do not understand well. It was Otani who noticed the reason ...
